## Task

A clear, scoped task suitable for a first contribution.

## Skills needed

- [ ] TypeScript
- [ ] React
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CLI

## Files to look at

- `path/to/relevant/file.ts`

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Documented if user-facing
